name: Bamboo Panda
description: A Panda has just landed in our forests! This imposing black and white animal is hungry and wants only one thing… eat bamboo! Feed him before he goes for a little nap, but watch out, other pandas in the jungle are also fighting for the bamboo. They hide in the bamboo in order to stop you. Do not underestimate these pandas, they are armed! Stay vigilant ... The war of bamboo is about to start.
